data.pageTitle: About Graziano Casto — DevRel Engineer & CNCF TAG Tech Lead
data.pageDescription: Learn more about Graziano Casto, Developer Relations Engineer at Akamas, CNCF TAG DevEx Tech Lead, Kubernetes Blog Maintainer.

mainEntity.name: Graziano Casto
mainEntity.description: Senior DevRel Engineer at Akamas, Tech Lead at CNCF TAG Developer Experience, Kubernetes Blog Maintainer, and Open Source advocate specializing in Cloud Native technologies.

mainEntity.name: What is Graziano Casto's role at CNCF?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graziano Casto is the Tech Lead for the CNCF TAG Developer Experience, where he provides technical leadership and sets the strategic direction for projects impacting the cloud-native developer community. He also serves on the Kubernetes Release Team as Release Comms Lead for v1.35.

mainEntity.name: What topics does Graziano Casto speak about?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graziano speaks about Cloud Native technologies, Kubernetes, Platform Engineering, AI efficiency and performance optimization, Developer Experience, and DevOps practices. He focuses on practical implementations and real-world case studies.

Graziano has spoken at KubeCon, CNCF events, WeAreDevelopers, Open Source Day, and 50+ international conferences across Europe and online. He presents at both in-person events in Italy and globally, and at virtual meetups and conferences worldwide.

Graziano is a former distributed systems developer and product manager, now working as Senior DevRel Engineer at Akamas. He holds a Computer Science Bachelor's degree from Politecnico di Milano and has been active in the Kubernetes and CNCF open source community since 2024.
